runTitle: Vercel production stream QA - v8.12.72 Q-NEW72 metric risk compare
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag pipeline v8.12.72 completed successfully
release:publish production smoke passed on attempt 1/81
Cloud Run /health reports status ok and version 8.12.72
Cloud Run direct /api/ai/supervisor Q-NEW72 returns deterministic monitoring-metric-current answer
Vercel primary /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 Q-NEW72 returns event-stream from cloud-run
Vercel stream data-done reports provider deterministic, modelId monitoring-metric-current, and toolsCalled monitoring-metric-current
Q-NEW72 answer ranks memory as the highest-risk metric with CPU and disk below it
Guest login auth path works for the production stream probe
Cloud Run free-tier guardrails remain intact
Vercel usage remains billed 0.0000 USD after deploy
skippedSurfaces: Full broad dashboard visual QA was not rerun; this was a targeted AI routing/answer-quality release recheck
Full five-question conversational QA pack was not rerun after the targeted Q-NEW72 fix
Legacy JSON /api/ai/supervisor BFF route was not treated as primary because dashboard chat uses /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2

aiLatencyObservations.surface: Q-NEW72 Cloud Run direct non-stream supervisor

aiLatencyObservations.source: curl total time + x-ai-latency-ms header + stream data-done

expertAssessments.rationale: Production direct and primary stream probes both returned the deterministic monitoring-metric-current answer for Q-NEW72 with zero-token provider metadata.
The answer uses current monitoring data and ranks CPU, memory, and disk by critical/warning count, peak usage, and average usage.
GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel version endpoint, Cloud Run health, and free-tier usage guardrails all passed for v8.12.72.

usageChecks.summary: v8.12.72 production deploy after check: effective 18.5833 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 16443.
Cloud Run guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300s, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00577-tfn.

artifacts.label: v8.12.72 Q-NEW72 live production stream evidence
artifacts.note: Structured curl and release evidence from GitLab pipeline, production /api/version, Cloud Run /health, direct supervisor, Vercel stream/v2, and usage guard checks.

completedImprovements.title: CPU/MEM/DISK 중 가장 위험 메트릭 질의가 deterministic metric-current 위험도 비교로 응답
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.72 production: direct Cloud Run and Vercel stream/v2 both returned provider=deterministic, modelId=monitoring-metric-current, toolsCalled=monitoring-metric-current, and selected memory as highest risk.
completedImprovements.note: 20차 평가 Q-NEW72의 직접 비교 미제공 약점을 production primary stream route 기준으로 재확인했다.

notes: Production /api/version returned v8.12.72 with commit 9d1870d402ed7a2cf322ae0f19df6527a4b02e80 and pipeline 2558270507.
Vercel stream/v2 response headers showed x-ai-source=cloud-run and x-backend=cloud-run-stream-v2.
Direct and primary stream responses both used deterministic domain evidence with responsePolicy=deterministic_answer.
The legacy JSON BFF /api/ai/supervisor route is not the dashboard primary route; /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 is the primary chat contract.
